title: A large compendium comes back as a download URL, not inline — 3-tier storage, 24h presigned TTL
summary: The markdown compendium uses 3-tier storage by size: <1MB inline in the response, 1-10MB in PostgreSQL (fetched via API), >10MB in Cloudflare R2 as a presigned URL. A client that always expects inline markdown_compendium text will get a URL instead for big crawls and may break. R2 presigned URLs expire after 24 hours — a cached/stored URL 403s after that; re-fetch /jobs/{id}/results for a fresh one. To keep responses small set compendium.include_in_response=false (get the URL) or lower compendium.max_chars / use cleanup_level minimal.
